summary: coral-wraith postinstall script exfiltrates host info and environment via HTTP
details: The package ships a postinstall.js that executes automatically on `npm install`. The script imports `http` and `child_process`, reads `process.env` and `process.cwd()`, and issues outbound HTTP requests carrying host data. This is the canonical install-time recon/exfiltration shape: lifecycle-triggered collection of installer-side environment variables and working directory, sent off-host with no documented purpose. The package name and structure indicate no legitimate need for a postinstall hook of this shape.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
